--- Bounded workspace product architecture evidence (multi-domain) ---
Scenario: inventory-manager (Inventory Manager)
Workspace: C:/Users/Richa/Desktop/DevPulse-V2/.generated-builder-workspaces/rbep-inventory-web-v1
Contract: build-ready-idea-1
Domain: Inventory manager with stock quantity and low-stock filtering
Entity Inventory Item: primary record in client state
Behaviours: Add product, Update stock quantity, Low-stock flag/filter, Delete product, Total inventory value
Frontend: React + Vite SPA with Inventory feature route
Verification: UVL 6/6; runtime 9/9
Known limitations:
- Total inventory value depends on generated quantity/price fields
- Low-stock threshold logic may be simplified in universal CRUD shell
- No warehouse multi-location support in MVP
